channel.title: Cenk Kurtoğlu — Next.js Template Releases
channel.description: Editable Next.js and Tailwind CSS website starters for freelancers and agencies.

item.title: 20 Next.js Website Templates for Agencies and Freelancers
item.description: Twenty editable niche-focused website starters built with Next.js 15.1, React 19, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS 3.4. One-time price: $79 USD.
